description: Discriminator vocabulary for CommitmentRoot. Four substrate-agnostic categories: estate_checkpoint | recall_receipt | transition_bundle | revocation_checkpoint.

anyOf.description: Periodic snapshot anchor for an AgentEstate.
Anchor for a RecallReceipt body hash.
Anchor for an estate-transition bundle (cycle-005 EstateTransition successor).
Anchor for a sanctions/revocation checkpoint roll-up.
